idea-plugin.name: Alias Source Navigator
idea-plugin.description:
Connects generated TypeScript auto-import aliases to their original source exports for both navigation and usage search.

Designed for Vue and Vite projects using tools such as unplugin-auto-import and unplugin-vue-components. Instead of stopping in auto-imports.d.ts, imports.d.ts, or components.d.ts, navigation continues to the referenced composable, store, or component. Find Usages on a source export also includes references resolved through those generated declarations.

Also supports Laravel Wayfinder: navigating a generated controller method such as PatientController.autocomplete() offers both the PHP controller method and the Wayfinder named TypeScript export.

  • Supports named exports and default component exports.
  • Handles relative typeof import(...) declaration aliases.
  • Connects TypeScript and Vue auto-import usages back to source exports.
  • Jumps from Wayfinder route methods to PHP controller methods.
  • Leaves normal IDE navigation unchanged for non-alias symbols.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.3.1

  • Fixes Wayfinder PHP navigation so Goto Declaration shows both the PHP method and the named TypeScript export.

0.3.0

  • Adds Laravel Wayfinder navigation from generated route methods to PHP controller methods.
  • Offers dual targets for Wayfinder methods: PHP definition first, then the named TypeScript export.

0.2.1

  • Fixes read-access exceptions when Find Usages runs on a background thread.

0.2.0

  • Adds reverse usage discovery from source exports through generated auto-import declarations.
  • Supports auto-imported usages in TypeScript and Vue consumers.

0.1.0

  • Initial release.
  • Redirects generated auto-import declarations to their original source exports.
